results.name: homeward effect
results.description: Regain control of stuff you own.

results.name: horn

results.description: Things that are hot, like fire or explosions.

results.name: hovercraft
results.description: Hovering vehicles. Are they aircraft? Technically still land vehicles? You decide!

results.description: Creatures with lesser power can't block these creatures.

results.name: hrothgar
results.description: Beast-like race from Final Fantasy XIV. See also [Ronso](ronso) for the similar species from Final Fantasy X.

results.name: humble
results.description: Nerf a creature's stats and/or abilities as a form of removal. See also [shapechange](/tags/card/shapechange), [swap removal](swap-removal) and [deanimate](deanimate).
